preference.name: emailAssetEntryAddedBody_ja_JP
preference.value:
Dear [$TO_NAME$],

[$NEW_LINE$][$NEW_LINE$]This is an autogenerated email for the [$PORTLET_NAME$] portlet.

[$NEW_LINE$][$NEW_LINE$]The following asset entries have been added to [$PORTLET_TITLE$]: [$ASSET_ENTRIES$].

[$NEW_LINE$][$NEW_LINE$]Sincerely,
[$NEW_LINE$][$FROM_NAME$]
[$NEW_LINE$][$FROM_ADDRESS$]
